package.name: jetbot_slam
package.description: Camera-based SLAM for JetBot using RTAB-Map. Monocular RTAB-Map can only do appearance-based loop-closure detection, not independent metric mapping - metric scale comes from jetbot_base's odometry (currently open-loop/dead-reckoning, since the Waveshare kit has no wheel encoders). Real occupancy-grid obstacle mapping for Nav2 still requires the planned LiDAR or a depth camera; this package gives visual localization/loop-closure only.
